- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in ADS events. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for taking part in ADS events. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days within 180 days.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for the 2nd quarter 2026:

[Table:  ADS Group]
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in CNY.
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- School pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals.

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 207 CNY per person
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/lva/travel-insurance)
Checklist for ADS Group 

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa applications is 5-10 working days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably
                                                                        when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation. 

## Download Form
Authorization letter 
Declaration of Insurance 
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx).
                                                                        The application form should be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 
According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click here

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreigners who need to stay in Latvia more than 90 days in 180-day period depending on the circumstances should apply for a long-stay visa (or a residence permit). In case of successful
                                                                        Residence Permit Applications, applicants can apply for OCMA decision visa.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreigners who need to stay in Latvia more than 90 days in 180-day period depending on the circumstances should apply for a long-stay visa (or a residence permit). In case of successful
                                                                        Residence Permit Applications, applicants can apply for OCMA decision visa. 

## Visa Fees

[Table:  OCMA Decision]
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in CNY.
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Teacher who works in the private educational institution "Latvijas International School" and his family members.
- Children 12 years and under

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa applications is 5-10 working days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably
                                                                        when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation. 

## Download Form
Authorization letter 
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx).
                                                                        The application form should be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 
According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click here

## Overview
Visit to family or friend visa application is applicable in case you are travelling for visiting your family member or friend. This visa is given for a period of the stay up to 90 days
                                                                        within 180 days.

## Visa Fees
Application fees applicable for the 2nd quarter 2026:

[Table:  Visit to Family/Friends]
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in CNY.
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Children below 6 years on the date of submission
- School pupils, students, postgraduate students and accompanying teachers who undertake stays for the purpose of study or educational training
- Researchers from third countries travelling for the purpose of carrying out scientific research
- Representatives of non-profit organizations aged 25 years or less participating in seminars, conferences, sports, cultural or educational events organized by non-profit organizations
- Family member of EU/EEA and Switzerland nationals.

## Logistic Fee
Service Charge for Visa Application – 207 CNY per person 
Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries. If you have not purchased, please click here (https://visa.vfsglobal.com/chn/en/lva/travel-insurance)
Checklist for Visiting Family and Friends 

## Photo Specifications
All photos must meet the requirements listed below. If these requirements have not been met, the applicant will have to deliver a new photo that meets the requirements. The photo requirements
                                                                        are the same for children as for adults.

## The Photo shall:
- be in sharp focus, clear and with good contrasts
- be printed on quality photo paper with high solution
- be in colours with a light background
- be 35-45 mm in width
- maximum 6 months old, resemble the applicant
- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.
- Chin, forehead and both cheeks shall all be clearly visible
- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa applications is 5-10 working days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably
                                                                        when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation. 

## Download Form
Authorization letter 
Declaration of Insurance 
Visa Form: The online visa application form is available at https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx (https://epak.pmlp.gov.lv/NVIS.EService001.WebSite/ApplicationMain.aspx).
                                                                        The application form should be filled–out online and the Visa online application form should be printed out. 
According to the Personal Information Protection Law of the People’s Republic of China and other applicable laws and regulations to protect your personal information, VFS Global must obtain the consent from you for the processing of your personal data and proceed with your visa application. Please download, print, fill, sign and submit the consent form along with your visa application form, without which we will not be able to proceed with the application lodgment. Click here

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Foreigners who need to stay in Latvia more than 90 days in 180-day period depending on the circumstances should apply for a long-stay visa (or a residence permit).
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, students from the third countries (except nationals of these countries (https://likumi.lv/doc.php?id=212364))
                                                                        who are enrolled into education institutions accredited in Latvia can apply for the long stay visa. After receiving a long stay visa (valid for 90 days), upon entering Latvia, students
                                                                        are subjected to apply for a residence permit at the Office of Citizenship and Migration Affairs of Latvia (OCMA).
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
Foreigners who need to stay in Latvia more than 90 days in 180-day period depending on the circumstances should apply for a long-stay visa (or a residence permit).
According to the Immigration Law of Latvia, students from the third countries (except nationals of these countries (https://likumi.lv/doc.php?id=212364))
                                                                        who are enrolled into education institutions accredited in Latvia can apply for the long stay visa. After receiving a long stay visa (valid for 90 days), upon entering Latvia, students
                                                                        are subjected to apply for a residence permit at the Office of Citizenship and Migration Affairs of Latvia (OCMA).

## Visa Fees

[Table:  Study/ Voluntary Work]
Above mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid in CNY.
Exemption of Visa Fee:
- Teacher who works in the private educational institution "Latvijas International School" and his family members.
- Children 12 years and under

## Logistic Fee

Please Note:
The applicable visa fee in CNY is as per the current exchange rate. The same is subject to change without notice. 

## Documents Required

- be in colours with a light background

- full-face, facing the camera directly, eyes looking straight at the camera
- show the whole head and the top of the shoulders. The face shall occupy 70-80 % of the picture
- show open eyes that are clearly visible. Hair shall not cover the eyes

## Regarding glasses:
Glasses are allowed as long as the eyes are clearly visible.
- the glasses cannot be coloured
- the rim must not cover any part of the eyes
- there cannot be reflection in the glasses

## Regarding head-dress:
Religious head-dresses are allowed provided that all details of the face are clearly shown.

- Shadows in the face due to the head-dress are not allowed

## Processing Time
Normally, processing time for visa applications is 5-10 working days, counting from when all requested documents have been submitted. This period may be extended in specific cases, notably
                                                                        when further scrutiny of this application is required, for example, when you are requested to come to an interview or submit additional documentation.
